item.title: East African Community’s expansion has triggered financial troubles: why solutions come with risks
item.description: The East African Community is one of Africa’s oldest regional economic organisations. Its birth in 1967 was the culmination of decades of economic ties forged in the colonial era between Kenya, Uganda and Tanzania. It’s no surprise that the EAC is also the most deeply integrated #SouthAfrica #Business #SouthAfricaEconomy #SouthAfricaNews
